step_rationale: TNF receptor detected in coronary thrombi; death-receptor family involved in thrombotic inflammation.
mechanism: TNFRSF10C acts as a TNF superfamily receptor contributing to inflammatory signaling and platelet-leukocyte crosstalk in coronary thrombus.

references.title: Association between coronary thrombus composition and microvascular obstruction following percutaneous coronary intervention in patients with acute myocardial infarction: A proof-of-concept study.
